system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I just placed an order, but my card only has $1131 left and the order is over $1160. Can you help me split the payment with another card? I need to fix this quickly.

Thank you for reaching out. I can help you with your order, but our system only allows a single payment method per order and does not support splitting payments across multiple cards.

If you’d like, you can change the payment method for your pending order to another card or a gift card with sufficient balance. To assist you further, I’ll need to authenticate your identity. Could you please provide your email address or your first name, last name, and zip code?

Sure, my name is Daiki Sanchez, zip code 46236, email daikisanchez1479@example.com. 

If I can’t split the payment, can you tell me what the most expensive item in my order is and how much it costs? Maybe I can just cancel that item.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm having trouble verifying your information at the moment. To proceed, I need to authenticate your identity using either your email or your name and zip code, but there seems to be a technical issue.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance, or would you like to try again with your details?

Let’s try again. My name is Daiki Sanchez, zip code 46236, email daikisanchez1479@example.com.

If it still doesn’t work, can you just cancel the whole order so I can order again? I really need to get this sorted out fast.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

arguments.summary: User Daiki Sanchez (zip 46236, email daikisanchez1479@example.com) needs urgent help with a recent order. Unable to authenticate user due to technical issues. User wants to either split payment or cancel the order if splitting is not possible.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently experiencing technical difficulties and cannot access your account to assist with your order. I recommend contacting our customer service directly or trying again a bit later. I apologize for the inconvenience and understand the urgency of your request. If you need immediate assistance, please reach out to our support team by phone or chat.
Alright, I’ll call customer service directly. Thanks anyway.
Thank you for your understanding, Daiki. I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve this for you right now. If you need further assistance later, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Good luck with your order!
Thanks. I’ll try again later. Have a good day.
You're welcome, Daiki. Thank you for your patience. Have a great day, and feel free to reach out anytime if you need help in the future!
Thank you. Bye.
You're welcome! Goodbye, Daiki. If you need any assistance in the future, I'm here to help. Have a wonderful day!
Thanks, bye!
You're welcome! Goodbye!
Bye!
Goodbye! Take care!
You too!
Thank you! 😊
You're welcome! 😊
Thank you! If you need anything in the future, just let me know. Have a great day! 😊
Will do! Thanks again. Have a great day! 😊
You're very welcome! Wishing you a wonderful day as well. 😊 If you ever need help, I'm here for you!
Thank you, that means a lot! Take care! 😊
You're very welcome! Take care as well, Daiki. 😊
Thank you! 😊
You're welcome! 😊
